fragment.grimarcana.ember_smear: A smear of ash that pulses faintly with residual heat.
fragment.grimarcana.scorched_glyph: A rune etched into scorched stone — the marks still radiate warmth.
fragment.grimarcana.false_flame: An elaborate inscription, carved with deliberate strokes. Something about it seems almost too perfect.
fragment.grimarcana.still_shard: A chip of stone that sits unnaturally still, as if nothing could move it.
fragment.grimarcana.binding_rune: A near-complete rune inscribed deep into obsidian. It feels anchoring just to hold.
fragment.grimarcana.shifting_scrap: A scrap of paper covered in ink that never quite settles.
fragment.grimarcana.fractured_lens: A cracked lens that bends light in ways it shouldn't.
fragment.grimarcana.hollow_echo: A hollow fragment that seems to absorb sound nearby. Strangely, it also feels slightly warm.
fragment.grimarcana.dormant_seed: A dried seed that hums faintly, as though waiting for the right moment.
fragment.grimarcana.preserved_blossom: An ancient flower, perfectly preserved. The inscription beneath the petals is almost fully intact.
fragment.grimarcana.worn_bone: A fragment of bone with worn runes. Time has erased most of the inscription.
fragment.grimarcana.crumbling_tablet: A crumbling stone tablet. The inscription is largely intact but the medium is failing.
fragment.grimarcana.void_crystal: A crystallised absence. It is difficult to describe what you are holding.
fragment.grimarcana.hollow_impression: An impression of something that should be there but isn't. The edges feel cold.
fragment.grimarcana.intentioned_feather: A feather that seems to point somewhere, as if it still carries direction.
fragment.grimarcana.spirit_medallion: A carved medallion whose inscription is almost complete. It feels purposeful.
fragment.grimarcana.hint.suspicious: Something about this fragment feels wrong.
message.grimarcana.research_complete: You commit the fragment to memory.
message.grimarcana.already_researched: You have already studied this fragment.
message.grimarcana.wrong_reagent: The reagent does not resonate with this fragment.
